kept.text:
According to this lady, her son never ordered food from
.@DoorDash, having a new job he thought he would treat his brothers to some Burger King via the DoorDash app however when the food arrived the bun on one of the .@BurgerKing sandwiches had a huge mold spore on it, when they went through the normal procedure of registering a complaint complete with photos through the app the action was declined, so she went online and looked up the Customer service phone number for DoorDash, the customer attendant on duty said they could not offer any relief, the customer service agent on duty then escalated the issue to a supervisor, when the supervisor came on the line he stated that NO COMPENSATION would be given due to his “past order history” when the mother pushed back stating how was this possible and aske for some explanation the supervisor said he was unable to look at the history… Understandably this left the woman perplexed as to how they could make a determination without being able to itemize when and where these purchases supposedly took place.

Do you think the teenager had used the app previously unbeknownst to his mother or DoorDash got this one wrong ?

Do you think she should have just gone to Burger King and demanded some satisfaction ?

kept.text:
Today, @TIME named DoorDash one of the 10 Most Influential Companies in Retail as part of this year’s #TIME100 Companies list.

What started as a mission to empower local economies has grown into:

🌏40+ countries around the world
📦 500,000+ products available in under an hour across the average U.S. consumer
📍 10B+ deliveries completed

From AI-powered merchant tools like SmartScale, to our delivery robot Dot, to the Autonomous Delivery Platform that optimizes delivery methods across all orders, we’re developing technology to level the playing field so local retailers can compete and thrive.

We’re building the infrastructure for the future of local commerce, expanding access to the products consumers need and the local businesses that power our communities.

https://t.co/ToLRsZdaPW

kept.text: Since we’re talking about the DoorDash case again, I’m going to bring up that there were several times driving rideshares that male passengers tried to use me as their last hail mary after striking out at the bar to straight up trying to offer me money for sex.

I asked a local DoorDash associate and she said they have ways they pass word around if you’re known not to tip.  Chantal they will mess with your order just to piss you off bc of that.  Example telling you substitute items 🤣
If you trade stocks, gamble, and use DoorDash you’re not allowed to complain about not being able to afford anything in this economy.
